title: Epic: Rich Push Notifications (ChatMessagePush)
description:
Why: IMPROVEMENTS.md §1.2 defines a new companion spec (draft-atwood-jmap-chat-push-00) for rich push notifications. Extends RFC 8620 PushSubscription with a chatPush property so the server can deliver ChatMessagePush payloads — message metadata plus optional body snippet — directly to the push endpoint without a follow-up fetch. No coverage exists in the current codebase.

What:
- PushSubscription chatPush property: per-chat filters, urgency preferences (high for mentions, normal for others)
- ChatMessagePush payload type: message metadata + optional body snippet
- ChatPushCapability struct: maxSnippetBytes, supportedUrgencyValues, maxMessagesPerPush
- Detect urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat:push in session capabilities
- Handle ChatMessagePush on the push receive path before attempting Message/changes
- E2EE mode: server delivers metadata-only (no body snippet); adjust notification rendering
- Fixture tests for payload parsing and PushSubscription/set with chatPush

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq)
